Quickstart¶

Install:

pip install sqcad

Basic usage¶

import sqcad

print(sqcad.about())

Next steps¶

  • Load an S-parameter network (measurement or simulation)

  • Fit resonator parameters (f0, κ) from S11/S22

  • Extract an equivalent circuit model for design iteration
